title: Watching TV Together 看电视剧
scene: 一家人在客厅一起看电视。

lines.en: Lily, do you want to watch TV with me?
lines.zh: 莉莉，你想和我一起看电视吗？

lines.en: Yes! Can we watch the animal show?
lines.zh: 想！我们能看动物节目吗？

lines.en: Sure. Let me find the channel.
Look at those pandas! They are so cute!
They eat bamboo all day. Pandas are very special.
lines.zh: 它们整天吃竹子。熊猫很特别。

lines.en: I want to see a real panda someday.
lines.zh: 我希望有一天能见到真正的熊猫。

lines.en: Maybe we can go to the panda reserve this vacation.
lines.zh: 也许这个假期我们可以去熊猫基地。
不过首先，你要先完成作业。

lines.en: OK, Dad. I will do it right after the show.
lines.zh: 好的，爸爸。节目看完我马上就做。
